channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: These Samsung Galaxy phones are set to add AirDrop – you probably can't sideload it early, though [Gallery] - 9to5Google
item.description:
1. These Samsung Galaxy phones are set to add AirDrop – you probably can't sideload it early, though [Gallery]  9to5Google
  2. This Trick Almost Adds AirDrop to a Bunch of Samsung Phones  Droid Life
  3. Samsung Galaxy S26: How To Finally AirDrop Photos To An iPhone  Forbes
  4. 'The same problem for me': Older Samsung phones are getting a long-awaited AirDrop upgrade, but many are reporting teething issues  TechRadar
  5. I’ve been waiting a decade for AirDrop on Android — and it’s finally fixed my biggest frustration  MSN

item.title: Apple stopped selling 14 products in March, including 3 with no replacements - 9to5Mac
item.description:
1. Apple stopped selling 14 products in March, including 3 with no replacements  9to5Mac
  2. Apple discontinues well-known product after 20-year run  New York Post
  3. Apple's last tower topples… and the others will follow  theregister.com
  4. No More Cheese Grater: The Mac Pro Is Discontinued  Gizmodo
  5. Apple Discontinues Mac Pro Desktop in Favor of the Mac Studio  Bloomberg.com

item.title: Gemini Live’s voices don’t sound like they should - 9to5Google
item.description:
1. Gemini Live’s voices don’t sound like they should  9to5Google
  2. Search Live is expanding globally  blog.google

  4. 😺 Google built real-life Pied Piper  The Neuron
  5. Revolution at Google! AI Now Answers Questions Directly Through the Camera  Yahoo News UK

item.title: Apple's iPhone Fold Promises the 'Most Significant Overhaul' in Product's History - CNET
item.description:
1. Apple's iPhone Fold Promises the 'Most Significant Overhaul' in Product's History  CNET

  5. iPhone Fold May Not Launch With iPhone 18 Pro Max: Why It’s Delayed to December  zeera wireless

item.title: Researchers Come Up With Foolproof Method to Certify Real Photos - PetaPixel
item.description:
1. Researchers Come Up With Foolproof Method to Certify Real Photos  PetaPixel
  2. Chips designed to help identify deepfakes  ETH Zürich
  3. Scientists have designed a way to save our brains from fake AI videos  Fast Company
  4. New chip technology aims to expose deepfakes at source  Computing UK
  5. These Camera Chips Were Designed Specifically to Tackle Deepfakes  ZME Science

item.title: 'A Significant Visual Boost': Assassin's Creed Shadows Will Soon Support PSSR 2 on PS5 Pro - pushsquare.com
item.description:
1. 'A Significant Visual Boost': Assassin's Creed Shadows Will Soon Support PSSR 2 on PS5 Pro  pushsquare.com

  3. Sony Confirms AI Frame Generation For PlayStation  Evrim Ağacı
  4. New PlayStation 5 feature is convincing PC gamers to switch – here’s why  Daily Express
  5. Assassin's Creed Shadows will become more technological on PS5 Pro - Sony showed how the graphics change thanks to the improved PSSR  IXBT.games
